src/main/java/ru/nokkov/blps_lab/BlpsLab.general_idea: Extend the main application class with SpringBootServletInitializer to enable deployment as a WAR file to external servlet containers like JBoss.
src/main/java/ru/nokkov/blps_lab/BlpsLab.human_impl: extends SpringBootServletInitializer { @Override protected SpringApplicationBuilder configure(SpringApplicationBuilder application) { return application.sources(BlpsLabApplication.class); } }

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Switch project packaging from jar to war to support deployment to an external application server like WildFly.
Exclude the embedded Tomcat starter to prevent conflicts when deploying to an external servlet container.
Exclude default Spring Boot logging dependencies (Logback, Log4j, SLF4J bridges) to rely on the application server's logging.
Add the Jakarta Servlet API dependency with provided scope to compile against the servlet container's API.
Add the WildFly Maven plugin to enable direct deployment and redeployment of the application to a local WildFly instance.
Add Spring Security starter and test dependencies to support the new security features mentioned in the commit log.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in entities and services.
Add Spring Boot starter validation to support bean validation annotations.
Reorder dependencies in the POM file, moving JPA and Security starters to a different position.
Downgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.3.0 to 3.2.4, possibly for stability or compatibility reasons with the target environment.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure the application to listen on a specific port.
Configure the primary datasource for the article database.
Configure the secondary datasource for the partner database.
Enable automatic SQL initialization on startup.
Enable SQL logging and formatting for debugging purposes.
Configure Hibernate to create and drop schema on startup.
Configure Hibernate naming strategies for camelCase to underscores conversion.
Set logging level for SQL statements to debug.
